CAREERS
At Funhaven, we believe that our team members are key to creating exceptional entertainment experiences for our guests. That’s why we’re always on the lookout for fun, high-energy individuals who are dedicated to providing outstanding service and making our guests’ visit unforgettable.
As one of Ottawa’s premier entertainment destinations, we offer a dynamic and fast-paced work environment that is both challenging and rewarding. We’re looking for individuals who are passionate about creating memorable experiences, and who are available to work late evenings and weekends to accommodate our guests’ needs.
We have a variety of positions available, including front-of-house roles such as customer service representatives, cashiers, and party hosts, as well as back-of-house positions such as kitchen staff, maintenance workers, and game technicians. No matter what your area of expertise may be, there’s a place for you on our team.
NOW HIRING: PARTY HOSTS & RUNNERS!

Are you outgoing, energetic, and love working with people? We’re looking for Party Hosts and Runners to join our team!

Part
